plan.failureSummary: The deterministic page.ai replay failed because the cached selector ('Select your occupation' / combobox) was not found. The website (unstable-survey) alternates between different form layouts ('Set 1' vs 'Set 2'), causing cached selectors from one layout set to fail on the other.
observedIndicators: Deterministic replay failed to find the combobox selector '#\:rl\:-form-item' / 'Select your occupation'
Failure screenshot shows 'Set 1' layout featuring 'Age Group' radio buttons, whereas the baseline/cache expected an occupation combobox
Historical run data exhibits an alternating SUCCESS/FAILED pattern with high regularity (pass rate ~73%), typical of alternating page states
The page.ai prompt is semantically flexible ('Fill out all of the survey questions with fake data') and can adapt easily to any layout if cached steps are cleared

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry the automation
remediationSteps.details: Retry the test execution with the page AI cache cleared (clearPageAiCache: true) so that page.ai can dynamically adapt to the active form layout.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic replay mode for this unstable survey test
remediationSteps.details: Modify the test or Donobu configuration to bypass deterministic caching/replay for this test file, as the target website is dynamically unstable and alternates form structures, making a static deterministic cache unsustainable.

plan.notes: The application intentionally alternates layouts. A single deterministic cache path cannot handle both layouts, resulting in the observed alternating SUCCESS/FAILED pattern in the run history. Clearing the cache and retrying will allow the current run to succeed, but a permanent fix requires disabling deterministic replay or adapting the test configuration for this highly dynamic page.
